I joined the Jakarta Ambassadors program

I have been doing spring for pretty much all my career. However, I always have had feelings for Java EE (now it is Jakarta EE). That’s why I recently joined the Jakarta Ambassadors program, mostly to learn and, incidentally, if I can contribute. So much exciting stuff going on in the Jakarta EE space. We have so many experience developers here, so if you want to contribute, please do or keep an eye on what’s going on, try out and give feedback; that’d be great.

We are very grateful to have support from Java Champion, Bangladesh JUG leader A N M Bazlur Rahman. Have you considered joining us? https://t.co/JtwTwatfzg // @bazlur_rahman pic.twitter.com/wxN85ztYcT

— Jakarta EE Ambassadors (@jee_ambassadors) May 17, 2022
